overall.description: Game footage from a truck simulator depicting nighttime winter driving on a snow-covered highway. The player follows a white coach bus through an intersection, experiencing a minor collision and waiting at a traffic light before continuing the journey.

agents.ego_description: driving steadily behind a white coach bus on the snowy highway, maintaining consistent speed

notable_agents.action: white coach bus driving ahead on the snowy road

entered.detail: multi-lane asphalt road covered in snow with visible tire tracks
tall street light pole illuminating the snowy road

segments.scene_description: Driving along a snow-covered highway at night, following a white coach bus. Street lights illuminate the road while snow falls steadily. The truck maintains a steady speed behind the bus with sparse traffic around.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway intersection approach with traffic control

events.description: slowing down as approaching the intersection and traffic light
minor collision with the rear of the white bus ahead
coming to a complete stop at the red traffic light behind the bus

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, colliding with the bus, and stopping at the red light

notable_agents.action: white coach bus slowing down and stopping at the red traffic light

entered.detail: tall traffic light pole with red signal visible
road lines and markings indicating the intersection junction

segments.scene_description: Approaching a highway intersection, the truck slows down and makes contact with the bus ahead before stopping at a red traffic light. The traffic light structure becomes visible ahead, and the road markings indicate a junction.

events.description: interior cabin bathed in red light from the traffic signal
snow continues to fall while waiting at the light, accumulating on windshield

agents.ego_description: stopped and waiting at the red traffic light behind the bus

notable_agents.action: white coach bus stopped at red light directly ahead

entered.detail: side road joining the main highway from the left

segments.scene_description: Stopped at the red traffic light behind the bus, the truck's interior is illuminated by the red glow of the signal. Snow accumulates on the windshield as the wipers continue to move, and a side road entrance is visible to the left.

events.description: traffic light turns green and the bus begins to move forward
accelerating through the intersection following the bus

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the green light and continuing along the snowy highway

notable_agents.action: white coach bus accelerating through the intersection

entered.detail: open highway stretching ahead beyond the intersection

segments.scene_description: As the traffic light turns green, the bus ahead accelerates and the truck follows through the intersection. The vehicle continues along the snow-covered highway, leaving the traffic light behind and proceeding into the open road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey along a snowy nighttime highway that transitions from a steady drive to a momentary halt at a city intersection. It begins with the camera trailing a white coach bus under the glow of street lights as snow falls steadily across the road. As the truck approaches a highway junction, it slows down and makes slight contact with the bus before coming to a complete stop at a red traffic light. The scene then shifts to a static perspective where the truck's interior is bathed in a red glow while wipers clear accumulating snow from the windshield. Finally, as the light turns green, the bus accelerates forward and the truck follows through the intersection, proceeding back into the open, snow-covered expanse of the highway.
